pageContext.name: Bugs Bunny
pageContext.description: Ehhh, what's up Doc   It's Rabbit Season! Show all of your friends just how much you appreciate the original Looney Tunes character lineup with this high-quality and beautifully hand-painted Bugs Bunny collectible statue. This valuable collectible was delicately crafted in one-sixth scale to ensure it fits right into your collection!  Don't miss your chance to add this limited edition Looney Tunes statue to your collection for an extra nostalgic display!
